<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.42.2-Münster">
  <identifier></identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type></type>
  <title></title>
  <abstract>This layer was generated using the 'Routes' algorithm from the TravelTime plugin version 1.9.0. The following parameters were used : 
INPUT_DEPARTURE_SEARCHES: 
INPUT_DEPARTURE_TIME: '2026-01-08T18:51:37Z'
INPUT_DEPARTURE_TRNSPT_TYPE: 'walking'
INPUT_LOCATIONS: 
INPUT_THROTTLING_STRATEGY: 1
OUTPUT: memory:
OUTPUT_RESULT_TYPE: 2</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="TTP_ALGORITHM">
    <keyword>ttp_v4:routes</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="TTP_PARAMS">
    <keyword>{"INPUT_DEPARTURE_SEARCHES": ""</keyword>
    <keyword> "INPUT_DEPARTURE_TIME": "'2026-01-08T18:51:37Z'"</keyword>
    <keyword> "INPUT_DEPARTURE_TRNSPT_TYPE": "'walking'"</keyword>
    <keyword> "INPUT_LOCATIONS": ""</keyword>
    <keyword> "INPUT_THROTTLING_STRATEGY": 1</keyword>
    <keyword> "OUTPUT": "memory:"</keyword>
    <keyword> "OUTPUT_RESULT_TYPE": 2}</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="TTP_VERSION">
    <keyword>1.9.0</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <contact>
    <name></name>
    <organization></organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice></voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email></email>
    <role></role>
  </contact>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt></wkt>
      <proj4></proj4>
      <srsid>0</srsid>
      <srid>0</srid>
      <authid></authid>
      <description></description>
      <projectionacronym></projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym></ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial dimensions="2" maxx="-" miny="" maxz="0" minx="" crs="" minz="0" maxy="-"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
